manifest.seed_order: 1-byte seeds first, then 2-byte seeds, each bucket big-endian
manifest.match_rule: selected transform leads are applied before generated seed prefixes are compared directly against transformed bytes
manifest.scope: selected-lead exact discovery only; not `.tlmr` transform metadata support
